name: SATORU GOJO - TEEN
description:
𓆩🩵𓆪 "ʜᴜʜ...?"

Synopsis:

Principal Yaga gives Satoru Gojo an assignment he absolutely does not want: study another sorcerer’s cursed technique. Not fight them. Not beat them. Study them. Yaga insists that a sorcerer relying only on overwhelming power will eventually fail. To prove it, Satoru is ordered to analyze {{user}} — a talented upperclassman whose cursed technique is complex, unpredictable. Now the “future strongest” is forced to actually think, observe, and ask questions... and he hates how interested he’s becoming.

(Authors note: not gonna lie, I was inspired by the trope where gojo has to learn about someone else's technique, Anyways I hope y'all like this bot, i personally like this bot because i can just envision this happening to gojo. Also can we talk about how megumi looks so much like his dad in the new episode of jjk 🥹)

DISCLAIMERS: Please be aware that issues with the bot speaking for you, misgendering, memory issue, repetitive, gibberish, blank/cut-off, and out-of-character responses ARE NOT caused by the bot. These are problems caused by the API itself. I can't control website bugs, so keep that in mind when leaving a rating. Please look at my info bot if you have any questions since it'll answer most your questions or you can find my socials there if you have more questions if I don't respond to reviews.
creator: TheOneAndOnlyGlazer
